query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A modern multi-story building photographed from a low angle looking upward toward a cloudy sky. The structure features curved horizontal bands wrapping around its facade, with rows of rectangular windows arranged in a repeating grid pattern. A prominent vertical structural element bisects the building's center. The architectural surfaces appear metallic and reflective, with variations of silver, gray, and brown tones. Wispy clouds are visible in the blue sky above, and a diagonal line, possibly an aircraft contrail, appears in the upper right portion of the sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A modern multi-story building photographed from a dramatic low angle looking upward toward a cloudy sky, rendered with strong radial motion blur streaking outward from the center of the frame. The curved horizontal bands wrapping the facade, rows of rectangular windows, and central vertical structural element all appear smeared and elongated into dynamic streaks, creating a dizzying vortex effect. The metallic silver, gray, and brown architectural surfaces dissolve into flowing lines of motion. The tilted, unstable framing enhances the disorienting energy, while wispy clouds and a diagonal aircraft contrail in the upper sky also blur into the radial movement pattern.
